query: Analyze Ethereum market performance, on-chain transaction volume, and risk metrics for the past 30 days. Highlight any concerns for the risk team.
Compare Bitcoin and Ethereum volatility over the past month. Calculate the annualized Sharpe ratio for both and recommend which has better risk-adjusted returns.
What is the current state of DeFi transaction volume on Polygon and Solana? Identify any week-over-week growth anomalies and assess compliance risk for high-value transactions.
Generate a risk assessment report for a portfolio with 60% ETH, 30% BTC, and 10% MATIC. Include VaR, CVaR, and correlation analysis.
If our fee revenue is $180,920 on $45,230,000 volume, what is our take rate? How does a 15% volume increase impact projected annual fee revenue? Show all calculations.
